title: Talk:Palestinian Islamic Jihad
wikitext:
{{Talk header}} {{WikiProject banner shell|class=B|1= {{WikiProject Palestine|importance=Mid}} {{WikiProject Crime and Criminal Biography|importance=Low|terrorism=yes|terrorism-imp=High}} {{WikiProject Syria |importance=Low}} {{WikiProject Lebanon |importance=Low}} }} {{Arab-Israeli Arbitration Enforcement}} {{old move|date=6 May 2023|from=Islamic Jihad Movement in Palestine|destination=Palestinian Islamic Jihad|result=moved|link=Special:Permalink/1154130877#Requested move 6 May 2023}} == Islamic republic of iran == The article mentioned to islamic regime in iran which is incorrect at all.pls replace that with islamic rebublic of iran. [[User:Ert141|Ert141]] ([[User talk:Ert141|talk]]) 17:49, 8 August 2022 (UTC) :I'm not sure what's incorrect about referring to the government of Iran as a regime and Islamic? -- [[User:Beland|Beland]] ([[User talk:Beland|talk]]) 03:07, 12 March 2024 (UTC) == All the Sources are Israeli == What's up with that? For example, the press truck incident is from an Israeli source. How can I trust this article? It's the same Israel who said Iran would bomb the 2022 World Cup, yet the World Cup ended peacefully. Israeli newspapers are not trustworthy. Did you not find enough content from other sources? Nothing to write about? [[User:Moses Alkadhem|Moses Alkadhem]] ([[User talk:Moses Alkadhem|talk]]) 16:43, 4 January 2023 (UTC) :{{reply|Moses Alkadhem}} If you're talking about the June 2007 attack, I see the Jerusalem Post and Human Rights Watch cited. If you're saying the government of Israel was predicting an Iranian World Cup bombing, TJP is independent from the government and as far as a I know has a reputation as a reliable source. If you have evidence that TJP is not a reliable source, you might want to start a discussion at [[Wikipedia talk:Reliable sources]]. I see a few previous discussions were mentioned at [[Wikipedia talk:Reliable sources/Perennial sources/Archive 8#The Jerusalem Post]]. Of course we would take their country of origin into account when looking for bias, as we would do with newspapers from any country, but this does not mean they are unreliable when simply reporting facts. -- [[User:Beland|Beland]] ([[User talk:Beland|talk]]) 03:06, 12 March 2024 (UTC) ::Sorry, the right subpage is [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources/Noticeboard]], and actually there's already a thread there at [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources/Noticeboard#Jerusalem Post]]. -- [[User:Beland|Beland]] ([[User talk:Beland|talk]]) 03:11, 12 March 2024 (UTC) == Extended-confirmed-protected edit request on 27 April 2023 == {{Edit extended-protected|Islamic Jihad Movement in Palestine|answered=yes}} Add the Active Region “Jenin camp” Since the Jenin brigades have taken control over it. [[Special:Contributions/188.161.241.250|188.161.241.250]] ([[User talk:188.161.241.250|talk]]) 19:12, 27 April 2023 (UTC) :[[File:Red information icon with gradient background.svg|20px|link=|alt=]] '''Not done:''' please provide [[Wikipedia:Reliable sources|reliable sources]] that support the change you want to be made. [[User:Lightoil|Lightoil]] ([[User talk:Lightoil|talk]]) 02:24, 28 April 2023 (UTC) == Requested move 6 May 2023 ==
:''The following is a closed discussion of a [[Wikipedia:Requested moves|requested move]]. '''Please do not modify it.''' Subsequent comments should be made in a new section on the talk page. Editors desiring to contest the closing decision should consider a [[Wikipedia:move review|move review]] after discussing it on the closer's talk page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.'' The result of the move request was: '''moved.''' ([[Wikipedia:Requested moves/Closing instructions#Closure by a page mover|closed by non-admin page mover]]) – [[User talk:MaterialWorks|Material]][[Special:Contributions/MaterialWorks|Works]] 17:48, 13 May 2023 (UTC) ---- [[:Islamic Jihad Movement in Palestine]] → {{no redirect|Palestinian Islamic Jihad}} – Move to clear [[WP:COMMONNAME]]. [[User:Iskandar323|Iskandar323]] ([[User talk:Iskandar323|talk]]) 09:30, 4 May 2023 (UTC) ''This is a contested technical request'' ([[Special:Permalink/1153474251|permalink]]). [[User:Robertsky|– robertsky]] ([[User talk:Robertsky|talk]]) 16:10, 6 May 2023 (UTC) :: I see that there was [[Talk:Islamic_Jihad_Movement_in_Palestine#Article_name|a brief discussion]] on the talk page about 11 months ago which indicates that the name change might not be uncontroversial. A full discussion might be in order. [[User:Robertsky|– robertsky]] ([[User talk:Robertsky|talk]]) 15:04, 4 May 2023 (UTC) :::Brief indeed, with just two comments, both aligning on the notion of it being the [[WP:COMMONNAME]], but one mulling whether there may be some cause for confusion - unsubstantiated, however, it hardly competes with policy. [[User:Iskandar323|Iskandar323]] ([[User talk:Iskandar323|talk]]) 10:25, 5 May 2023 (UTC) ::::But there was some discussion, hence it is a [[WP:PCM]], hence it should go to a full [[WP:RM]]. I'm not objecting to the move though. -[[User:Kj cheetham|Kj cheetham]] ([[User talk:Kj cheetham|talk]]) 10:07, 6 May 2023 (UTC) *'''Strong Support''': [[Palestinian Islamic Jihad]] (PIJ) is [https://books.google.com/ngrams/graph?content=Palestinian+Islamic+Jihad%2CIslamic+Jihad+Movement+in+Palestine%2CPIJ&year_start=1800&year_end=2019&corpus=en-2019&smoothing=3 demonstrably] more common. '''〜 [[User:Festucalex|Festucalex]] • [[User talk:Festucalex|talk]]''' 12:30, 7 May 2023 (UTC) * '''Strong support''' Per nom [[User:PalauanReich|PalauanReich]][[User talk:PalauanReich|🗣️]] 13:02, 10 May 2023 (UTC)
The discussion above is closed. Please do not modify it. Subsequent comments should be made on the appropriate discussion page. No further edits should be made to this discussion.
== Note == Website out of use, move please; Dares of operation formar error "1981-present" (no space needed) [[Special:Contributions/93.140.249.63|93.140.249.63]] ([[User talk:93.140.249.63|talk]]) 05:53, 11 November 2023 (UTC) :There's spaces because it's "October 1981" not just "1981", per [[MOS:DATERANGE]]. –[[User:CWenger|CWenger]] ([[User talk:CWenger|^]] • [[Special:Contributions/CWenger|@]]) 16:03, 11 November 2023 (UTC) == Islamic fundamentalism == Different sources and books describing PIJ as [[Islamic fundamentalist]]: {{cite news|title=Starved of Justice|date=2012|work=Amnesty International|quote=The PIJ is a fundamentalist Islamic terrorist organization, striving to establish "an Islamic caliphate under Shariah Law" through terrorism.|url=https://www.amnestyusa.org/wp-content/uploads/2017/04/israelopt_starved_of_justice_060612-final.pdf}}{{cite news|title=Islamic Fundamentalism in the West Bank and Gaza|date=March 1994|quote=fundamentalist organizations Muslim Brotherhood (Hamas) and Islamic Jihad|url=https://iupress.org/9780253208668/islamic-fundamentalism-in-the-west-bank-and-gaza/}}{{cite news|title=What is Palestinian Islamic Jihad?|date=2 January 2024|work=Jewish Unpacked|quote=A fundamentalist Islamist organization, PIJ rejects the Oslo Accords and a two-state solution, seeking the destruction of Israel|url=https://jewishunpacked.com/what-is-palestinian-islamic-jihad/}}{{cite news|title=What is Hamas, who are its top leadership? A deep dive|date=12 October 2023|work=India Today|quote=At the time, Hamas’s purpose was to counter Palestinian Islamic Jihad (PIJ), another Islamist fundamentalist militant organisation|url=https://www.indiatoday.in/world/story/what-is-hamas-gaza-war-leaderes-palestine-israel-explainer-2447821-2023-10-12}}{{cite news|title=Foreign Terrorist Organizations|date=6 February 2004|quote=fundamentalist Palestinian Islamic Jihad and Hamas|url=https://apps.dtic.mil/sti/tr/pdf/ADA445052.pdf}}{{cite news|title=ASSAD'S KEY EXPORT: TERROR|date=5 April 2007|work=New York Post|quote=fundamentalist Palestinian Islamic Jihad|url=https://nypost.com/2007/04/05/assads-key-export-terror/}}{{cite news|title=Palestinian Islamic Jihad|work=Parliament of Australia|quote=The PIJ is a Sunni fundamentalist group|url=https://www.aph.gov.au/parliamentary_business/committees/House_of_Representatives_Committees?url=pjcis/hamas_pkk_let_pij/report/appendix%20g.htm}}{{cite news|title=The Palestinian Islamic Jihad|work=ITIC|quote=Inspired by the Islamic Revolution in Iran, the Palestinian Islamic Jihad has a radical fundamentalist Sunni Muslim ideology.|url=https://www.terrorism-info.org.il/en/c/the-palestinian-islamic-jihad/}}{{cite news|title=The World Almanac of Islamism: 2011|date=27 October 2011|quote=fundamentalist Palestinian Islamic Jihad|url=https://books.google.co.il/books?id=5oLNv7_tB9MC&pg=PA109&lpg=PA109&dq=%22fundamentalist+palestinian+islamic+jihad%22&source=bl&ots=mwNdvp8Dof&sig=ACfU3U0kpMHGa4EGHNReknl6f8y7JD56og&hl=iw&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjb2aCXgYSFAxVJ0gIHHYVwB5wQ6AF6BAgpEAM#v=onepage&q=fundamentalist%20Palestinian%20Islamic%20Jihad&f=false}}{{cite news|title=Israel Yearbook on Human Rights, Volume 45|date=2015|quote=The Palestinian Islamic Jihad ("PIJ") is a fundamentalist organisation that developed out of the Islamic Jihad in Egypt, a radical branch of the Muslim Brotherhood|url=https://books.google.co.il/books?id=mS4DEAAAQBAJ&pg=PA247&lpg=PA247&dq=%22(PIJ)+is+a+fundamentalist%22&source=bl&ots=MZa5hXIT5s&sig=ACfU3U3p42rBcUtym5eSxTamk9eYJ2dz4A&hl=iw&sa=X&ved=2ahUKEwjTxtHGjYSFAxUo2AIHHT5eDs8Q6AF6BAgjEAM#v=onepage&q=%22(PIJ)%20is%20a%20fundamentalist%22&f=false}} [[User:Bakbik1234|Bakbik1234]] ([[User talk:Bakbik1234|talk]]) 00:40, 21 March 2024 (UTC) :I dont really have a problem including that, but we do already include [[Islamism]], and we dont actually discuss their domestic political beliefs really at all in the article. That should probably be corrected, but I dont personally think its an issue adding Islamic fundamentalism to it. Would probably get rid of Islamic nationalism though. '''[[User talk:Nableezy|nableezy]]''' - 01:39, 21 March 2024 (UTC) {{reflist-talk}} == Flag == Since the flag was deleted for violating copyright I think it might be a good idea to create an infobox icon like with [[:File:InfoboxHez.PNG|Hezbollah]]. [[User:Charles Essie|Charles Essie]] ([[User talk:Charles Essie|talk]]) 19:06, 29 April 2024 (UTC) == there are more allies == It only states in this article that the only nonstate allies are hamas and hesbollah, but does not mention groups like, PFLP, DFLP, almujahiden brigades, jibril brigades, salah adin brigades, ansar allah and many others, they had publicly supported and conducted operations with all of these groups that are listed, please someone add them [[User:Theman1284|Theman1284]] ([[User talk:Theman1284|talk]]) 08:21, 15 July 2024 (UTC) :@[[User:Theman1284|Theman1284]] Ok I'll try. [[User:BangladeshiEditorInSylhet|BangladeshiEditorInSylhet]] ([[User talk:BangladeshiEditorInSylhet|talk]]) 15:54, 10 October 2024 (UTC) == Improvement == We should attempt to Improve this page by adding more information in the page, This paramilitary force has relations and are allies of other paramilitary forces and resistance groups, We should add that information. [[User:BangladeshiEditorInSylhet|BangladeshiEditorInSylhet]] ([[User talk:BangladeshiEditorInSylhet|talk]]) 15:56, 10 October 2024 (UTC) == Edit request: Reference to hostage-taking == Please can someone with edit rights add in the hostage-taking by PIJ during the current war. There are multiple reports of PIJ holding Israeli hostages, including Arbel Yehud, Gadi Moses and Elad Katzir. References for this appear several times in the [[Israel–Hamas war hostage crisis|main page on the hostage crisis]]. [[User:MosheDov1|MosheDov1]] ([[User talk:MosheDov1|talk]]) 16:02, 26 January 2025 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:Flag of Islamic Jihad Movement in Palestine.webp|Flag of Islamic Jihad Movement in Palestine.webp]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/File:Flag of Islamic Jihad Movement in Palestine.webp|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 15:36, 23 May 2025 (UTC) == Alliance of palestinian forces == I'm not totally sure how to rejig the sentence, but the alliance of Palestinian forces does not seek the establishment of a sovereign Islamic Palestinian state. That may be PIJ's aim, but that can not be said for APF, whose membership includes secular and left wing groups as well as Islamic ones. [[User:Browk2512|Browk2512]] ([[User talk:Browk2512|talk]]) 22:32, 13 June 2025 (UTC)

sections.line: A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion
